# MMS Design Specification > **Internal Document** - Implementation guide for the interactive demo with Vite + React 18 + deck.gl > > **Source of Truth**: `docs/RFQ.md` only > > **Primary Feature**: Planning View with Sandbox Mode (What-If Scenarios) --- ## 1. Executive Summary ### 1.1 Objective Win the bidding process by demonstrating an exceptional frontend solution that addresses all client pain points from the RFQ. The demo must visually impress while proving we can deliver a production-ready "Single Pane of Glass" for Rolling Stock Maintenance. ### 1.2 RFQ Pain Points → Our Solutions | # | Client Pain Point (RFQ) | Our Solution | Key Visual Element | |---|------------------------|--------------|-------------------| | 1 | No dedicated mileage management tools | Purpose-built mileage dashboard | KPI Cards + Mileage indicators | | 2 | IBM Maximo only does asset management | Integrated mileage + maintenance planning | Unified Planning View | | 3 | Manual Excel management | Interactive visual timeline with drag operations | Gantt-style canvas | | 4 | Folder-driven data storage | Centralized fleet visualization | Sidebar + Fleet grid | | 5 | Limited maintenance-operations integration | Single pane for both teams | Shared workspace | | 6 | Non-compliance risk (underrun/overrun) | Visual alerts + compliance indicators | Color-coded tasks + banners | | 7 | **No predictive simulations** | **Sandbox Mode for what-if scenarios** | **PRIMARY FEATURE** | | 8 | Insufficient resource visibility | Resource utilization panels | Heatmap + capacity bars | | 9 | Manual handling delays | Automated scheduling visualization | Smart conflict detection | --- ## 2. Design Philosophy ### 2.1 Inspiration Attribution We draw from multiple sources, each contributing specific elements: | Source | What We Take | What We DON'T Take | |--------|--------------|-------------------| | **Linear App** | Dark mode aesthetic, typography, whitespace, micro-interactions | Sprint/issue tracking patterns (different domain) | | **JetBrains Fleet Islands UI** | Modular layout, panel separation, information density | IDE-specific features | | **DHTMLX Gantt** | Timeline visualization, task bars, dependency lines | Light theme default | | **Railnova Railfleet** | Fleet dashboard patterns, train status indicators | Specific ECM workflows | | **deck.gl/Kepler.gl** | GPU-accelerated rendering, smooth transitions | Geospatial focus | ### 2.2 Core Principles 1. **Density with Clarity** (Islands UI) - Pack information without overwhelming 2. **Dark Mode First** (Linear) - Reduce eye strain, modern aesthetic 3. **Modular Panels** (Fleet) - Visually separated functional areas 4. **Direct Manipulation** (Gantt) - Drag to reschedule, resize to extend 5. **GPU Performance** (deck.gl) - 60fps even with 15k+ tasks --- ## 3. Moodboard ### 3.1 Aesthetic Reference: Linear App The visual "mood" comes from Linear - minimalist, dark, typography-focused. *Linear: Dark mode default, generous whitespace, bold typography* *Linear: Multi-layered views with clean tab navigation* ### 3.2 Layout Reference: JetBrains Fleet Islands UI Complex information organized into distinct "islands" - perfect for enterprise apps. *Fleet Islands UI: Modular panels, transparent styling, reduced cognitive load* *GitKraken: Similar density with clarity approach* ### 3.3 Domain Reference: Scheduling Software Gantt chart patterns from scheduling software. *DHTMLX Gantt: Dark theme, task bars with dependencies, timeline header* ### 3.4 Domain Reference: Railway Software Fleet management patterns from railway industry. *Railfleet: ECM fleet management, maintenance workflows* ### 3.5 Rendering Reference: deck.gl GPU-accelerated visualization capabilities. *Kepler.gl: deck.gl-powered data visualization* *Flowmap.blue: Timeline-based flow visualization* *SandDance: Interactive data exploration with smooth transitions* --- ## 4. Design System ### 4.1 Color Palette (Dark Mode) ``` BACKGROUND (Islands UI inspired) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ bg-canvas: #0A0A0A (Main canvas background) bg-panel: #141414 (Island panels) bg-elevated: #1C1C1C (Cards, popovers) bg-hover: #262626 (Interactive hover) bg-active: #2A2A2A (Active/selected) BORDERS (Subtle separation) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ border-subtle: #1F1F1F (Panel edges) border-default: #2E2E2E (Dividers) border-strong: #404040 (Focus rings) TEXT (High contrast) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ text-primary: #FAFAFA (Headlines) text-secondary: #A1A1A1 (Body) text-tertiary: #6B6B6B (Labels) text-disabled: #404040 (Disabled) SEMANTIC - MAINTENANCE TYPES (From RFQ) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ a-check: #10B981 (Green - Quick, 10k km) b-check: #3B82F6 (Blue - Standard, 50k km) c-check: #F59E0B (Amber - Major, 200k km) d-overhaul: #EF4444 (Red - Full, 800k km) SEMANTIC - STATUS ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ success: #10B981 (Compliant) warning: #F59E0B (Approaching limit) danger: #EF4444 (Overrun/conflict) info: #3B82F6 (Informational) HEATMAP GRADIENT (Capacity/Workload) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ low: #FEF3C7 (Yellow-100) medium: #FB923C (Orange-400) high: #DC2626 (Red-600) critical: #7F1D1D (Red-900) SANDBOX MODE ACCENT (Distinct from baseline) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ sandbox-accent: #8B5CF6 (Violet-500) sandbox-bg: #0F0A1A (Violet-tinted canvas) sandbox-border: #6D28D9 (Violet-700) ``` ### 4.2 Typography ``` FONT FAMILY (Fleet-inspired) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Primary: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif Monospace: JetBrains Mono, monospace (IDs, numbers) SCALE ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ h1: 24px / 600 / -0.02em (Page titles) h2: 18px / 600 / -0.01em (Section headers) h3: 15px / 600 / 0 (Panel titles) body: 13px / 400 / 0 (Default text) caption: 11px / 500 / 0.02em (Labels) mono: 12px / 500 / 0 (Train IDs, dates) ``` ### 4.3 Spacing & Radius ``` SPACING (4px base unit) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ xs: 4px (Tight gaps) sm: 8px (Default gap) md: 12px (Panel padding) lg: 16px (Section gaps) xl: 24px (Major sections) 2xl: 32px (Page margins) RADIUS (Islands UI - subtle rounding) ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ sm: 4px (Buttons, inputs) md: 6px (Cards, panels) lg: 8px (Modals) full: 9999px (Pills, badges) ``` --- ## 5. Application Shell ### 5.1 Layout Structure (Islands UI Pattern) ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ NAVBAR [48px] │ │ Logo │ [Planning] [Resources] [Reports] │ ◉ LIVE ○ SANDBOX │ User │ ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ │ │ │ ┌───────────────┐ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐│ │ │ │ │ TIMELINE ISLAND [40px] ││ │ │ FLEET │ │ ← 2024 │ Jan │ Feb │ Mar │ Apr │ May │ Jun │ → → ││ │ │ ISLAND │ ├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤│ │ │ │ │ ││ │ │ [160px] │ │ PLANNING CANVAS ││ │ │ │ │ (deck.gl) ││ │ │ Search... │ │ ││ │ │ ─────────── │ │ Semantic Zoom: MACRO → MESO → MICRO ││ │ │ ▼ Alstom(79) │ │ ││ │ │ ALT-001 ● │ │ ┌─────────┐││ │ │ ALT-002 ● │ │ │ MINIMAP │││ │ │ ALT-003 ◐ │ │ │ [120×60]│││ │ │ ... │ │ └─────────┘││ │ │ ▼ Kinki(49) │ │ ││ │ │ KNK-001 ● │ │ ││ │ │ │ │ ││ │ └───────────────┘ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘│ │ │ │ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐│ │ │ STATUS ISLAND [28px] ││ │ │ Zoom: 1.25x │ View: MESO │ Visible: 1,234 tasks │ Fleet: 128 trains ││ │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ``` ### 5.2 Navbar Component ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ [●] MMS Planning Resources Reports │ ◉ LIVE ○ SANDBOX │ 👤 Admin │ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ↑ ↑ ↑ Navigation Mode Toggle User Menu (transparent tabs) (PRIMARY INTERACTION) ``` **Mode Toggle Behavior:** - `LIVE` → Production baseline (read-only interactions) - `SANDBOX` → Simulation mode (full editing enabled, violet accent) ### 5.3 Fleet Island (Sidebar) ``` ┌─────────────────┐ │ FLEET │ ← Panel title (h3) ├─────────────────┤ │ 🔍 Search... │ ← Filter input (transparent) │ │ │ ▼ Alstom (79) │ ← Collapsible group │ ALT-001 ● │ ← Train row: ID + status │ ALT-002 ● │ ● = operational │ ALT-003 ◐ │ ◐ = in maintenance │ ALT-004 ○ │ ○ = out of service │ ... │ │ │ │ ▼ Kinki (49) │ │ KNK-001 ● │ │ ... │ ├─────────────────┤ │ Shown: 128 │ ← Footer stats │ Selected: 0 │ └─────────────────┘ ``` **Row Height:** 24px (synced with canvas pxPerTrain) **Scroll:** Bidirectional sync with canvas Y position --- ## 6. Planning View (Main Canvas) ### 6.1 Semantic Zoom Levels The canvas morphs based on zoom level - "Google Earth for time." | Level | Zoom | Time Scale | Visualization | Purpose | |-------|------|-----------|---------------|---------| | **MACRO** | < 0.5x | 10-12 years | Heatmap cells | Strategic planning | | **MESO** | 0.5x - 2.0x | 1-3 years | Task blocks | Tactical planning | | **MICRO** | > 2.0x | 1-8 weeks | Detailed cards | Operational planning | ### 6.2 MACRO View (Strategic - zoom < 0.5x) ``` 2024 2025 2026 2027 2028 2029 2030 ... ├───────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼───────┼───── ALT-001│ ▓▓▒▒░ │ ▓▓▓▒▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▓▓▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▒▒░ │ ░░░░░ │ ALT-002│ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▒▒░ │ ▓▓▓▒▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▓▓▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▒▒░ │ ALT-003│ ▓▓▓▒▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▒▒░ │ ▓▓▓▒▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ▓▓▓▓▒ │ ▒▒░░░ │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ Legend: ░ Low workload ▒ Medium ▓ High █ Critical ``` **Implementation:** deck.gl HeatmapLayer or GridCellLayer **Cell Size:** Month × Train row **Color:** Yellow→Orange→Red gradient based on man-hour density **Interaction:** Click cell to zoom into that period ### 6.3 MESO View (Tactical - 0.5x to 2.0x) ``` Jan 2025 Feb 2025 Mar 2025 Apr 2025 ├────────────────┼────────────────┼────────────────┼──────────── ALT-001│ ████████ │ ████ │ ██████████████│ ████ │ ALT-002│ ██████ │ ████████████ │ ████ │ ██████████ │ ALT-003│ ██████████│ ████ │ ████████ │ ████ │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ ... │ Legend: ████ = Task block (colored by type: A/B/C/D) ``` **Implementation:** deck.gl ScatterplotLayer or SolidPolygonLayer **Block Width:** Duration in days × pxPerDay **Block Height:** Fixed (20px) **Colors:** Maintenance type (A=green, B=blue, C=amber, D=red) **Interaction:** Hover for tooltip, click to select ### 6.4 MICRO View (Operational - zoom > 2.0x) ``` Mon 15 Tue 16 Wed 17 Thu 18 Fri 19 Sat 20 ├─────────┼─────────┼─────────┼─────────┼─────────┼─────────┤ ALT-001│ ┌──────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ │ B-Check │──────┐ │ │ │ Track 2 │ 32 man-hrs │ 4 days │ │ │ │ └──────────────────────────────────┘ ▼ │ ALT-002│ ┌─────────────────────┐ │ │ │ Inspection │ │ │ │ Track 1 │ 8 hrs │ │ │ └─────────────────────┘ │ ALT-003│ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ │ C-Check ⚠️ CONFLICT│ │ │ │ Track 2 │ 160 man-hrs │ 6 days │ │ │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │ ``` **Implementation:** deck.gl TextLayer + IconLayer + PathLayer **Card Content:** Task type, track, man-hours, duration **Dependencies:** PathLayer with curved lines **Conflicts:** Red border + warning icon ### 6.5 LOD Transition Animation ``` Zoom: 0.1x ────── 0.5x ────── 2.0x ────── 5.0x │ │ │ LOD: MACRO → MESO → MICRO │ │ │ Crossfade: 0.4-0.5 1.8-2.0 (10% zone) (10% zone) ``` **Transition:** Opacity crossfade using Hermite smoothstep **Duration:** 200ms **Easing:** easeOutExpo --- ## 7. Sandbox Mode (PRIMARY FEATURE) ### 7.1 Concept Sandbox Mode enables **what-if scenario simulation** - the #1 missing feature in the RFQ. Users can experiment with schedule changes without affecting production data. ### 7.2 Mode Toggle ``` ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ │
